summary_one_line: Reaching the unicode-space guard with a non-space codepoint there, so space_type==NOT_SPACE takes the false branch; CMP_MAP gradient finds it, I2S substitution diverts vpc into the space-fallback path.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A font/buffer input whose current codepoint passes the _hb_glyph_info_is_unicode_space guard at line 191 yet has space_fallback_type == NOT_SPACE at line 194, so the line-195 comparison `space_type != NOT_SPACE` evaluates false. This requires bytes that drive a real glyph-decomposition path (kern/GPOS/GSUB table structure) rather than degenerate ASCII-space runs that resolve to a true space type.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile winner-resolving seeds carry structured table tags (kern at offset 0x0c, the 0x00 0x01 0x00 0x00 sfnt-version header) and diverse non-space codepoints; the per-role overlay shows the winner set taking the line-195 false side (W F=16) and the line-196 short-circuit chain, exercising the branch 38 times on average.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocking seeds are dominated by 0x20 (ASCII space) and 0x18 byte runs that resolve to an actual space type, so at line 195 space_type != NOT_SPACE is true (L T=12 F=0) and control diverts into the space-fallback block at 196-202; the loser never lands on the false side, blocking 10/10 trials for 23.9h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winner is value_profile, whose CMP_MAP gradient (Hamming/prefix distance buckets) rewards inputs that incrementally approach valid table-structure CMPs, steering the corpus toward well-formed non-space glyph inputs that reach line 195 with a non-space codepoint. The loser value_profile_cmplog adds input-to-state substitution, which copies intercepted comparison operands (e.g. the 0x0020 space codepoint compared at line 196 and unicode-space class constants) directly into the input, biasing vpc's corpus toward space-classified codepoints that satisfy line 195's != NOT_SPACE TRUE side and thus block the false branch. So the divergence is attributable to the I2S delta but the technique that *helps* is CMP_MAP gradient on the value_profile arm.

evidence_trail.claim: The globally blocked side is the false branch of the line-195 comparison space_type != NOT_SPACE.
The false branch is the globally blocked side.
Reaching line 195 requires passing the unicode-space guard at line 191, and the space type is computed at line 194.
The space type fed into line 195 is space_fallback_type of the current codepoint.
The winner value_profile takes the line-195 false side while the loser value_profile_cmplog takes only the true side.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: T=1 F=16  T=12 F=0  if (space_type != hb_unicode_funcs_t::NOT_SPACE &&

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile resolves 10/10 with average hitcount 38 on the branch; value_profile_cmplog blocks 10/10 for 23.9h.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=38  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: The decisive pair is value_profile beating value_profile_cmplog with delta I2S, prob_div=1.00.
Winner-resolving value_profile seeds carry structured sfnt-version header and kern table tag bytes.
Loser-blocking value_profile_cmplog seeds are dominated by 0x20 ASCII-space byte runs.
value_profile uses CMP_MAP gradient feedback that preserves inputs producing operand pairs closer to matching.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator; value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace.
The line-196 short-circuit compares the codepoint against the literal 0x0020 space.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is CMP_MAP gradient (value_profile arm), not I2SRandReplace, so lineage dash-row verification is not mandated. The winner is the non-I2S fuzzer value_profile; the I2S-equipped value_profile_cmplog is the LOSER, so this is an anti-I2S divergence where I2S substitution diverts vpc toward space-classified codepoints and the CMP_MAP gradient on value_profile is the helping technique.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose only gate is space_type != NOT_SPACE on a parsed codepoint where value_profile_cmplog resolves the false branch as fast as or faster than value_profile across trials would refute the claim that I2S operand substitution diverts vpc into the space-fallback path.

weakest_evidence_point: The causal link that I2SRandReplace copies the 0x0020/space-class constants into vpc inputs (rather than vpc merely lagging by chance) is inferred from the loser seeds' 0x20 dominance plus the mutator delta, not directly observed in lineage.
